title: Mirror Worlds
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for mirror-world compositions, testing multi-image reference, identity consistency, and reasoning composition across simultaneous life stages with GPT Image 2.

zh-CN.title: Mirror Worlds · 同角色跨时空同框
zh-CN.description: Mirror Worlds · 同角色跨时空同框：同一个人从小到老同时出现在同一空间的不同角落，测试身份一致性和时空拼接。
